{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/soil.png
|block_health=6.5
|tool=[[Shover]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

Soil is a soil that hosts temperate grass.

== Obtaining ==
Soil can be found in a variety of temperate biomes, either as grass blocks or in ground patches.
Breaking temperate grass will drop soil blocks.

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Soil]]
